title: Liver disease - NHS
text:
ohol Vaccines are available for hepatitis A and hepatitis B . These are recommended if you're at risk.
Important
You do not have to drink an excessive amount of alcohol to risk damaging your health. Regularly drinking just over the recommended levels can be harmful.
More information 
Use the BMI healthy weight calculator to find out your body mass index (BMI) Start the NHS weight loss plan Read about cutting down on alcohol Find out who should have the hepatitis A vaccine and who should have the hepatitis B vaccine
